children.text: For authority of Secretary to disapprove brewers’ bonds, see section 5551.
For authority of Secretary to require the installation and use of meters, tanks, and other apparatus, see section 5552.
For deposit of United States bonds or notes in lieu of sureties, see , United States Code.section 9303 of title 31
